content.en:
It took a long time for the event to end.

And before long, the entire Void Region knew the name of the True Void Holy Land, and the name of the Lord of the Word of Darkness.

Shortly thereafter, the Lord of the Word declared a retreat.

Not only did she have to stabilize her realm, but she also had to refine her several clones to the peak Legendary Realm lord level, and it would take a long time.

Before you know it, another ten eternal epochs have passed.

Ye Tian spent a lot of time, copied a large number of legendary ancestral endowments, and obtained a lot of legendary ancestral endowments.

For example, the legendary-level ancestor endowment in the Five Elements, he fused them all.

And, to this day.

Ye Tian finally took control of another Dao - the Golden Dao!

Controlling another way, for Ye Tian, his strength has not improved much, but the difficulty of comprehending the space has been greatly reduced.

At the same time, Ye Tian is also trying his best to find a life with a legendary-level space ancestor, and copy as many legendary-level space ancestors as possible, but the last time he copied so many time ancestors, it was lucky, but this time it was a little difficult, I am afraid that it will take a long time to gather enough legendary-level space ancestors, so as to merge into a legendary-level space ancestor.

Of course, Ye Tian was not in a hurry.

He himself is not very far away from controlling the space, if he controls a doorway, and then controls the space, it will be very easy.

Moreover, he also wants to accumulate 163 more foundations at the Legendary Realm Lord level, and in the future, if he breaks through to the peak Legendary Realm Lord level, his progress will be very fast.

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to comprehend one path after another.

Because he has a legendary-level ancestral endowment, the speed of comprehension is not slow, although there is no assistance from three thousand kites, but Ye Tian has comprehended the ancient desolate monument of time and space after all, and there is a trace of influence, so the speed of comprehension will not be too slow now.

Moreover, with the Lord of the Dark Word sitting in the True No Holy Land, Ye Tian could comprehend with peace of mind and not worry about the problems of the outside world.

And just like that, one eternal epoch after another passed.

Wooden road, water road, fire road, dirt road......

Ye Tian continued to control this path, and the obstacles of space to him became weaker and weaker.

At the same time, Ye Tian was also trying to create an incomparably powerful supreme technique, such as the top supreme technique.

Of course, the general top supreme technique must fuse the power of space and time, and Ye Tian did not completely control the space, so it was difficult to create a top supreme skill.

However, he has mastered multiple lanes and has a high control over space, promising to create a top-notch supreme technique.

Once he has created a top-notch supreme skill, his strength is definitely above his Legendary Realm Lord, even if he is not as good as the Peak Legendary Realm Lord, at least he will not be instantaneous.

So, in the following days, Ye Tian comprehended the path and created the top supreme technique.

However, Ye Tian soon encountered a shackle, as if there was an obstacle in the dark, which made him completely clueless.

So, Ye Tian was going to take a look at the attack methods of the Eternal Masters and see if he had any insights.

After all, if some eternal masters have just broken through, the means they have mastered are only the top supreme skills, so if you look at it more, there are still some benefits and understandings.

Void area, somewhere.

This is the place where the ancient desolate monument of time and space was born, and the two eternal masters fought for a short time, and after countless years, their traces still remain in this time and space, and they have not been able to erase it.

Therefore, it is also called the trace of the ancient desolate monument.

Ye Tian had been to the past time and space before, and had comprehended the ancient desolate monument of time and space, but he had not comprehended the traces of the attack of the eternal master, after all, time was precious at that time, where was there time to waste on it.

Buzz Buzz !!!

The unknown dimension of time and space, fist prints, and sword marks were densely covered in this time and space, allowing Ye Tian to witness the terrifying strength of the two eternal masters.

"It's so mysterious, every attack seems to run through the past and the future, and all the rules are difficult to resist. "

Ye Tian muttered.

He sat here cross-legged, constantly contemplating, occasionally rehearsing, trying to understand the mysteries.

In this way, Ye Tian had fully comprehended sixteen eternal epochs here before leaving.

Subsequently, Ye Tian went to the Deep River again, the Deep River used to be an Eternal Sea, but because of a great war, it was destroyed by the Eternal Master, this place is too ancient, until now, this Eternal Sea has not recovered, and is in a state of fragmentation.

However, this is also the place where the Eternal Masters have fought the most.

Somewhere in the deep sea.

Ye Tian came to the place where a finger was imprinted, this was the finger of the Eternal Controller Qinglian, Qinglian was a female Eternal Controller, her strength was incomparably powerful, and she was the Eternal Controller of the Supreme Holy Land of the Void Region, the Qinglian Holy Land.

The Qinglian Holy Land is very powerful, with six peak Legendary Realm Lords, and the number of ordinary Legendary Realm Lords has reached hundreds, which is far from being comparable to the True Saintless Land.

"This finger of Qinglian's controller seems to be even more mysterious, could it be that her strength is even stronger?"

Ye Tian didn't know much about the division of strength and strength of the Eternal Controller, but judging from this point, the strength of the Qinglian Controller was probably stronger than that of the ordinary Eternal Controller.

Ye Tian conscientiously comprehended this finger, and gradually, he comprehended the power of space, time, power, speed, wood path and waterway from this finger, and this finger fused all these powers together, thus bursting out with a terrifying force, enough to shatter everything.

Here, Ye Tian fully comprehended twenty-three eternal epochs, and then left and went to other places to comprehend

In this way, Ye Tian continued to comprehend and constantly change places.

Before you know it, a hundred eternal epochs have passed.

For Ye Tian, this is also a very long time.

And after many times of understanding, understanding, and drilling, Ye Tian is finally about to create a top-notch supreme skill

this day.

A replica body of Ye Tian practiced supreme skills in the long river of time.

Abrupt.

He punched out and directly pierced the river of time, a large part of the river of time collapsed, and countless time and space were annihilated.

The power of this punch has far surpassed the supreme skill of the tant.

"The top supreme technique has finally been created, this punch combines the power of time, some space and the power of the five elements, and has reached a certain balance, although it is not perfectly fused, but at least it has reached the threshold of the top supreme skill. "

"What is this punch called?"

"Let's call it Six Dao Fist!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After creating six fists, Ye Tian's strength skyrocketed, and now he could completely kill a powerful Legendary Realm Lord with one punch, such as a Legendary Realm Lord like the Black Water Lord, and he couldn't stop him with a punch.

At this moment, Ye Tiancai has truly transformed. _

16. To see the ununderlined version of the novel, please download the Flying Novel APP!
